name: ycc-pos
description: Sistema POS completo para Country Club

scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter pos dev" "pnpm --filter kds dev" "pnpm --filter admin dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter pos build && pnpm --filter kds build && pnpm --filter admin build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter pos typecheck && pnpm --filter kds typecheck && pnpm --filter admin typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter api test && pnpm --filter pos test && pnpm --filter kds test && pnpm --filter admin test
